provenance.subject: Science
provenance.chapterTitle: A Journey Through States of Matter

questions.text: Which state of matter has a fixed shape and volume?
questions.explanation: Solids have both fixed shape and fixed volume. The particles are tightly packed and cannot move freely.

questions.text: Water changes from liquid to gas through evaporation.
questions.explanation: Evaporation is the process where liquid water changes into water vapor (gas) when heated.

questions.text: What happens to ice when it is heated?
questions.correctAnswer: Ice melts and changes from solid to liquid (water).
questions.explanation: When ice (solid water) is heated, it absorbs energy and melts into liquid water at 0°C.

questions.text: The process of changing from gas to liquid is called ________.
questions.explanation: Condensation is the process where water vapor (gas) cools and changes back into liquid water.
